title: Claude Code VS Codex VS OpenCode
summary: NeuralNine compares three code generation tools, Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode, across ease of use, model exclusivity, variety, tooling, efficiency, and practical project performance. The analysis includes a hands-on Sudoku project demonstration and covers open-source considerations.
